```{=html}
<div style="width:80%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.7em 1.2em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1.3em 1.5em 1.4em;box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(86,84,162,0.16);border:1px solid rgba(86,84,162,0.22);text-align:center;">

  <div style="width:2.8em;height:2.8em;border-radius:0.7em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EEEDF8,#E1DFF5);border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.7em;color:#5654A2;box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(86,84,162,0.18);"><i data-lucide="presentation" style="width:1.4em;height:1.4em;stroke-width:1.7;"></i></div>

  <div style="font-size:0.72em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.85em;">
   You are looking at the output right now. All three parts of this workshop were built with <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#5654A2;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.1em 0.45em;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;">/ph-slide</code>.
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.5em;">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;background:#DCE9FA;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;border-radius:999px;padding:0.25em 0.75em;">Agentic Basics</span>
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;border-radius:999px;padding:0.25em 0.75em;">Skills</span>
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;background:#FEF5E7;border:1px solid #FAE9C8;border-radius:999px;padding:0.25em 0.75em;">Data Safety</span>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-top:0.85em;font-size:0.48em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.5;">One theme, one taste, three decks. The template does the holding-still.</div>

 </div>

</div>
```
